# MuleSoft API Governance

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (master) of API Governance documentation.
> See [API Governance llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-governance/llms-full.txt) for all the API Governance documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Identifying APIs to Govern](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-governance/add-tags.md)
- [Governance Console Overview](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-governance/api-governance-console.md)
- [Anypoint API Governance Release Notes](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-governance/api-governance-release-notes.md)
- [CLI Commands for API Governance](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-governance/cli-command-list.md)
- [Troubleshooting Anypoint CLI](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-governance/cli-commands-troubleshoot.md)
- [Sending Conformance Notifications](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-governance/configure-notifications.md)
- [Creating Custom Governance Rulesets](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-governance/create-custom-rulesets.md)
- [Applying Rulesets to Identified APIs](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-governance/create-profiles.md)
- [Creating Custom Rulesets by Modifying Published Rulesets](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-governance/custom-rulesets-modify.md)
- [Creating Completely New Custom Rulesets](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-governance/custom-rulesets-new.md)
- [Validating and Publishing Custom Rulesets](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-governance/custom-rulesets-validate-and-publish.md)
- [Governance Dashboard Overview](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-governance/dashboard-overview.md)
- [Finding and Fixing Conformance Issues](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-governance/find-and-fix-conformance-issues.md)
- [Specification Conformance](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-governance/find-conformance-issues.md)
- [Catalog Information Conformance](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-governance/fix-catalog-info-conformance-issues.md)
- [Documentation Conformance](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-governance/fix-documentation-conformance-issues.md)
- [Instance Conformance](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-governance/fix-instance-conformance-issues.md)
- [Getting Started with Anypoint API Governance](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-governance/get-started.md)
- [Anypoint API Governance Overview](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-governance/index.md)
- [Monitoring API Conformance](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-governance/monitor-api-conformance.md)
